name: Greenline Cannabis POS API
what_it_does: Greenline REST API for cannabis dispensary point-of-sale and retail compliance platform. Enables AI agents to manage cannabis product catalogs and inventory, process compliant retail transactions, integrate with METRC and provincial seed-to-sale tracking systems, handle customer loyalty programs, access sales analytics and reporting, manage staff and shift operations, and connect dispensary data with compliance reporting tools. Strong Canadian market presence.
use_cases: Managing cannabis inventory and product catalog from dispensary management agents
Processing compliant retail transactions with ID verification from POS automation agents
Syncing METRC and provincial compliance data from regulatory reporting agents
Accessing sales analytics from business intelligence agents
not_for: Non-cannabis retail without seed-to-sale compliance requirements
Cannabis cultivation without retail dispensary operations
States or provinces where cannabis retail is not legally permitted
best_when: A licensed cannabis dispensary in Canada or the US using Greenline POS wants AI agents to automate inventory management, transaction compliance, loyalty programs, and regulatory reporting.
avoid_when: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Cannabis retail requires state/provincial licensing and strict regulatory compliance. Age verification mandatory. METRC or provincial tracking compliance errors can result in license revocation.

auth.notes: Greenline uses API key and OAuth 2.0 for API access. Dispensary-level credentials. Partner integration program for technology integrations. Scopes control access to inventory, transactions, and compliance data.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — cannabis dispensary enterprise pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Monthly per-location pricing; enterprise pricing for multi-location operators
pricing.notes: Vancouver, BC Canada. Founded 2017. Strong Canadian cannabis market presence. Used by Canadian LPs and US dispensaries. Competes with Dutchie, Treez, and Flowhub. METRC and provincial tracking integrations. Bilingual (English/French) for Quebec compliance.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: State/provincial cannabis license required; strict regulatory compliance mandatory
No public MCP server — REST API with API key or OAuth2
Age verification mandatory for every transaction — automated sales must confirm ID check
METRC and provincial tracking compliance is critical — validate before automating
Strong Canadian market presence — supports both US and Canadian regulatory frameworks
Bilingual support for Quebec — French language compliance may affect API responses
agent_readiness.security_notes: Cannabis customer and compliance data. PCI-DSS, SOC2. API key and OAuth2. US and Canadian data residency. State/provincial licensing and tracking compliance mandatory.

security_score_components.security_notes: Cannabis compliance and customer data. PCI-DSS, SOC2. API key and OAuth2. US/Canadian data residency. METRC and provincial compliance required.
